name: io.github.Arrayo/smart-context-mcp
description: MCP server that reduces AI agent token usage by 90% with intelligent context compression, task checkpoint persistence, and workflow-aware agent guidance. Works with Cursor, Claude Desktop, Codex CLI, and Windsurf.

packages.installationInstructions: npm install -g smart-context-mcp && npx smart-context-init --target . --clients cursor
